name: View Log
description: Append-only log of export views generated from Canon snapshots. Each entry documents what was exported, when, from which snapshot, and with what options. Player-safe: can be included in exports to show version history without revealing internal details.

fields.name: snapshot_id
fields.description: Canon snapshot this view was built from

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO timestamp when view was generated

fields.name: build_manifest_ref
fields.description: Reference to the build manifest for this view

fields.name: options_summary
fields.description: Player-safe summary of export options used

properties.name: by_language
properties.description: Map of language code to completion percentage

fields.name: changes_since_prior
fields.description: Player-safe list of changes since the prior view (titles only, no spoilers)

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of change: added, updated, removed

fields.name: known_limitations
fields.description: Player-safe notes about what's incomplete or deferred

fields.name: prior_view_ref
fields.description: Reference to the previous view log entry (for diff tracking)
